'''Chiithii'n''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|lieutenant commander]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Navigator/Legends|navigator]] on the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWOSG" />

Chiithii'n was an acquaintance of [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], who found the Sullustan kindly and mild, but struggled to pronounce his name. After Farlander's [[Rescue of Sullustan Tech Staff|rescue of Sullustan tech staff]] captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the navigator conveyed to him the rescued prisoners' thanks, and offer of a feast of [[Drutash grub/Legends|Drutash grubs]] and a bath in the hot springs of [[Piringiisi]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]].<ref name="XWOSG" />
